CONTENT.Career: Born in Barcelona, Catalonia, Villahermosa was a youth product of hometown side RCD Espanyol, having joined the club in 2009. He made his senior debut with the reserves in 2019, and signed a professional contract with the club on 26 July 2021.Villahermosa made his first team – and La Liga – debut on 14 May 2022, coming on as a second-half substiute in a 1–1 tie with Valencia CF. In July 2023, he left the Pericos after 14 years, after not renewing his link.On 19 July 2023, Villahermosa signed for Primera Federación side CD Castellón. He contributed with two goals in 35 matches overall, as the club achieved promotion to Segunda División.
CONTENT.External links: Dani Villahermosa at BDFutbolDani Villahermosa at LaPreferente.com (in Spanish)Dani Villahermosa at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Daniel Villahermosa Martínez (born 2 January 2001) is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Spanish club CD Castellón.
